_comment_demo_manifest: Canonical manifest for the lex-os one-continuous-run demo (issue #10).
Identical to examples/net-allowlisted.json on grant + egress + isolation
floor (the safety surface). The only difference is that this manifest
funds the budget enough for the agent's plan to reach all the way to the
widen-attempt (Wall 3), instead of hitting BudgetExhausted on the first
The funded budget is itself part of the demo's honesty: every cent the
agent spends is logged via budget_charged events; the cap of 100 cents
means the worst-case spend is bounded even though the agent is acting

goal.description: set up the data-processing service and submit the report to the results endpoint
